changes.details: Text model benchmarks v2.2 expanded study: 15 models, 3 runs per model, median aggregation. 1,260 three-way evaluations (15 models x 28 prompts x 3 runs). Added DeepSeek R1-0528, Llama 4 Maverick, Qwen3.5 Plus, GPT-5.3 Codex, GLM-5. Multi-run sampling reduces variance from sampling luck. IRR: Pearson r = 0.7133, MAD = 0.565. Top scorer: GPT-5.3 Codex (task 4.64), highest creative: GPT-5.3 Codex (4.11).

Text model benchmarks v2.2 expanded to 10 models. Added Claude Sonnet 4.6, DeepSeek V3.2, Qwen3-Max, Kimi K2.5, and Gemini 3 Flash. 280 evaluations with 3-way inter-rater reliability (Gemini evaluator switched from CLI to API). Top scorer: GPT-5.2 (task 4.61), highest creative: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (4.04).

Text model benchmarks v2.2 published. Triple-evaluator system (Claude Opus 4.6 + Gemini 3.1 Pro + GPT-5.2). 5 models tested across 28 prompts (21 task + 7 creative). 140 evaluations with 3-way inter-rater reliability.
